spec_match.rationale: Robust compatibility lab that accurately probes alpha() support via CSS.supports() and dynamically applies either native alpha() or a fallback depending on capability.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive with color pickers, text inputs, and range sliders that update capability probes and the preview live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the purpose of a compatibility lab, detailing progressive enhancement and JS fallback patterns.

edge_cases.rationale: Exemplary handling of edge cases: it explicitly detects lack of support, applies a fallback, and provides visual feedback on the fallback path taken.

references.rationale: The parent index.html contains the ChromeStatus link, fulfilling the rule, though it is absent on this specific concept page.

design_system.rationale: Follows the design system styles, grid layout, and typography.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus link to Compatibility Lab
openQuestions.detail: Add a 'see also' or references section to the Compatibility Lab concept page that links directly to chromestatus.com/feature/5070160203481088 for completeness.
